name: Domino's Pizza Group PLC
description: The master franchisee for Domino's Pizza in the UK and Ireland with 1,399 stores. Asset-light franchise model but significant leverage from share buybacks. System sales £1.6bn.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: System sales £1,596m (+0.2% LfL in FY2025). 1,399 stores targeting growth toward 1,600+. Order volumes 71m pa. Collection channel growing. Store openings ~30-50 net pa.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying EBITDA margin on system sales ~8.4%. Franchise model = high incremental margins but supply chain pass-through dilutes group revenue margins. Corporate store expansion adds revenue but at lower margins.
assumptions.risks: Near-zero LfL growth in FY2024-25. Net debt £285m (2.26x EBITDA) from cumulative buybacks. Rising interest costs (USPP at 4-6%). Competitive delivery market. Order volumes declining (-0.9% in FY2025).
assumptions.catalyst: Store rollout toward 1,600, order recovery, delivery market growth, collection strength, and continued capital returns. Target leverage 1.5-2.5x.
assumptions.lastReportAnalysed: FY2025 Full Year Results (52w ended 28 Dec 2025)
